feed-pipeline-checker.evidence: public.feed_run_log table created via migration 20260312170005. RLS enabled: admin_read_feed_run_log policy (role IN platform_admin,admin). feed-orchestrator updated: on success writes consecutive_failures=0, health_status='healthy', last_success_at=now(). On error: consecutive_failures incremented, health_status escalates (1-2 failures='degraded', 3+='failed'). DataFeed interface updated with consecutive_failures, last_success_at, health_status fields.

dlq-system-checker.evidence: Health monitoring columns verified on public.data_feeds: consecutive_failures (int default 0), last_success_at (timestamptz), health_status (text CHECK IN healthy,degraded,failed). Index idx_data_feeds_health on health_status. feed_run_log table with indexes on feed_id, started_at DESC, status.

db_state.health_escalation_logic: 1-2 failures -> degraded, 3+ failures -> failed, success -> healthy + reset
